note: Image-level tile variants rescore only the artifact tile evidence T while keeping W/S/R fixed from the locked component cache. RZ6 downsample-before-full-pipeline requires full W/T/S/R rescoring and is not included in this run.

RZ0_full_native_tile.description: current W + native top1 T + S + R
RZ0_full_native_tile.name: Full native tile

RZ2_resized512_tile.description: resize long side to 512 before tile extraction; keep W/S/R fixed
RZ2_resized512_tile.name: Resized-512 tile

RZ3_center_crop_tile.description: replace native tile coverage with one center tile; keep W/S/R fixed
RZ3_center_crop_tile.name: Center crop tile

RZ4_tile_mean_aggregation.description: aggregate native tile scores by mean instead of top1; keep W/S/R fixed
RZ4_tile_mean_aggregation.name: Native tile mean aggregation

RZ5_current_top1_tile.description: explicit current top1 tile aggregation from component cache
RZ5_current_top1_tile.name: Current top1 tile
